stemHtml: OAL 136 departs Bern on MOLUS 4A RNAV departure. Total electrical failure — flying on standby instruments in IMC. Correct DISTRESS message?

options.a: PAN PAN x3, Bern Departure, OAL 136, unable RNAV due equipment, turning left heading 100 climbing 7000 ft.
options.b: PAN PAN x3, OAL 136, unable RNAV, total electrical failure, turning left heading 100 climbing 7000 ft.
options.c: MAYDAY, Bern Departure, OAL 136, unable RNAV due equipment, total electrical failure, request vectors, turning left heading 100 climbing 7000 ft.
options.d: MAYDAY x3, OAL 136, turning left heading 100 climbing 7000 ft.
